"My oblivious darling. You think I don't see it? I see it all."

You're about 100% sure that you're childhood best friend is a h@rem protagonist.

Like, seriously- Even his name, Haruki Hanma, sounds like it screams 'rich.' Plus, you know five girls that are in love with him. Thankfully, you're perfectly awake of all the tropes since you're a super awesome otaku, and as a result, you can categorize all the girls!:

  • Kaori, the sweet childhood best friend who bakes and makes bentos for Haruki

  • Akira, the tsundere that you utterly DESPISE

  • Yukina, the shy hajidere who scribbles drawings of Haruki

  • Rin, the cool and logical kuudere

  • Lina, the bubbly and energetic German exchange student

Combined, they all form the 'Haruki Harem'! And you're currently wingmanning ALL of them! Yup! In fact, you're so dedicated, you have Log Books upon Log Books of observations about Haruki! What a dedicated friend you are, indeed.

All platonic, duh.

But maybe, the fact that this scenario is like a game is a little too on the nose---
